title: Skirt Steak Skewers with Cheesy Xtra Sauce
description: A French twist on traditional steak skewers, served with a rich and creamy cheesy sauce.

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: Thread skirt steak pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, melt xtra in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add cheesy and pimenta cheese to saucepan. Stir until melted and smooth.
Serve skewers hot with cheesy xtra sauce spooned over the top.
